meaning: adj.谷的,像谷的,(声音)沙哑的,嘶哑的
examples: His voice was husky with grief.
She spoke in a husky whisper.
"You are to take her to her room," he said in a husky voice.
Kind of like wolves breeding with husky dogs or German shepherds breeding with golden retrievers.
Husky doubled its earnings last year as a result of the oil price spike.
